case_title: REBECCA P. IBAY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY IBAY, REBECCA P. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-09-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-09-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. RODELL RODIS INTERPRETS ENGLISH/TAGALOG - TAGALOG/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
